description: You are a robotics simulation engineer. A Webots world ('collision_debug.wbt') has been loaded, but the visual shapes have no collision geometry (boundingObject is NULL), causing physics issues. Configure the bounding objects for the following nodes: 'MOBILE_ROBOT' as a Box (width=0.4, height=0.2, depth=0.3), 'OBSTACLE_BOX' as a Box (0.6 x 0.6 x 0.4), and 'OBSTACLE_CYLINDER' as a Cylinder (radius=0.2, height=0.5). Save the corrected world to /home/ga/Desktop/collision_fixed.wbt.
